title: Improved Sodium/Embeddium RUS Translation
description: Improves russian translation for Embeddium/Sodium and it for some addons | Улучшает перевод Embeddium/Sodium,и добавляет его некоторым аддонам
body: [![Sodium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4e429b576ee30d94f9875976bab206328a8dcac.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) [![Embeddium](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c67424f5d82ac32025311ab139cb86ee36360a0.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/embeddium) [![CurseForge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4200d8a5be778dbaa1635a4a5e7cbf2c066eb248.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/improved-rus-sodium-translate) *** 🇺🇸 : **Improves russian translate for embeddium/sodium including some addons**: * [**Dynamic lights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights) * [**Chloride (Sodium/Emeddium++)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chloride) * [**Xenon (Embeddium fork)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xenon-forge) *** ![Русификатор | Ru](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f4e7ab4fcee79ec549db126c0c01dc7948e7d75a.png)![ussian Translation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3eb7ac74322cd1f782031042afc0ed8c75df172.png) *** 🇷🇺 : **Улучшение русского перевода для embeddium/sodium, и некоторых дополнений**: * [**Dynamic lights**](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-dynamic-lights) * [**Chloride (Sodium/Emeddium++)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/chloride) * [**Xenon (форк Embeddiumа)**](https://modrinth.com/mod/xenon-forge) ***
